name: XVape Fog Pro
summary: A convection vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a large battery, for patients wanting flavourful, lasting sessions.
description: The XVape Fog Pro is a convection device that heats up in around 15 seconds and supports both dry herb and concentrates, with a wax cup included. Temperature is adjustable from 100 to 220C, and the convection chamber gives rich, flavourful draws. A 3200mAh battery covers extended sessions and charges over USB-C. A solid mid-range choice for patients who want convection flavour and battery life that lasts through a long medicating day.
